dsl_rule.translation_notes: ATR_20 used as the adaptive volatility breakout threshold. Signal is context-dependent: entry triggers when price volatility (ATR_20) exceeds previous close, suggesting a breakout. Exit uses SMA_20 as a trend confirmation filter. The original source text was corrupted/unreadable, so exit conditions were inferred as a reasonable trend-based reversal per Rule 8. ATR naturally adapts to changing price levels and volatility without fixed thresholds.

source_rule_text: Create a volatility breakout by calculating the average true range of the past n bars, with the breakout threshold automatically adapting to changing price levels and volatility rather than using fixed values.
